For corporate travel programs

Full visibility over every dollar your people spend on travel.

Cinturon360 gives finance, procurement, and travel management teams pre-trip approvals, policy enforcement at booking, and CFO-ready spend reporting — all without changing your TMC relationship or booking channel.

Works alongside your existing TMC. No new booking tool required.

Talk to Us Join Waitlist

What corporate travel programs get

Governance tools that sit above the booking layer, so spend is controlled before it's committed — not reconciled after.

✅

Pre-trip approvals

Require approval before any travel is booked. Configure approval chains by team, department, destination, cost centre, or spend threshold. Approvers get notified instantly — no chasing email threads.

📋

Policy enforcement at booking

Policy rules are applied at the point of booking, not after the fact. Out-of-policy bookings are flagged, escalated, or blocked — and every exception is logged with a reason.

📊

Finance-grade spend reporting

Real-time visibility across all travel spend by segment, department, traveller, and cost centre. Export-ready for finance review, board reporting, or audit. Not Excel — structured data.

🔍

Full audit trail

Every booking, approval, exception, and policy change is logged with timestamps and actor IDs. Defensible records for compliance, internal audit, and regulatory review.

🏢

Works with your TMC

Cinturon360 doesn't replace your TMC. It gives your TMC better tools to manage your program — and gives your finance team visibility that was previously only available on request.

🏛️

Government and controlled environments

Audit-grade governance for travel programs operating under strict accountability requirements. Structured approvals, defensible records, and compliance reporting built in.

No disruption to your booking workflow

The governance layer above your booking channel

Cinturon360 sits above your existing booking flow. Your travellers book the way they always have — through your TMC, GDS, or direct channel. Cinturon360 applies policy, routes approvals, captures data, and delivers the reporting your finance team needs. Nothing changes for travellers. Everything changes for visibility.

See how integrations work →

Get control of your travel spend.

Talk to the team about how Cinturon360 can give your finance and travel management teams the visibility and governance they need — without disrupting your existing program.
